title: Interviews with Burlesque Performers 2020-2021
description: The data consists of interviews with Finnish burlesque performers, in which the interviewees talk about their own relationship with burlesque and how gender and embodiment are presented in burlesque. First, the interviewees were asked about their own relationship with burlesque, asking them, for example, how they became acquainted with burlesque and what burlesque means to them.
